mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_claim_export_file WHERE claim_id = #{claimId} AND status = 'READY' AND expire_at IS NOT NULL AND expire_at > #{now} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM supply_claim_export_file WHERE download_token = #{token} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_claim_export_file SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'READY' AND expire_at IS NOT NULL AND expire_at <= #{now}
